<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="ISKDVf9OrH8AsKEJhhcx"> <mxGraphModel dx="3303" dy="-9837" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-322.93" y="52770" width="1060.6" height="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Node starts cluster init" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="57.95" y="52800" width="300" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Enumerate all local IPv4 addresses" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="11.420000000000002" y="52920" width="393.05" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="For each node in config" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60.69" y="53050" width="294.53" height="60.91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Local IP
matches
node IP?" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="111.20999999999998" y="53170" width="193.47" height="193.47" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="Identify as this node" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="88.78000000000003" y="53440.00066115703" width="238.3457331136738" height="62.47933884297521" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Try next node" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-229.78" y="53235.5" width="229.81" height="62.48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Error: node not found" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="370.829291598023" y="53229.995206611566" width="249.91591433278418" height="62.47933884297521" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=10;endFill=1;endSize=10;" edge="1" source="3" target="4" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=10;endFill=1;endSize=10;" edge="1" source="4" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=10;endFill=1;endSize=10;" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="Yes" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="No" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, y="13" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="110" y="53370" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.54;exitY=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=10;endFill=1;endSize=10;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="8" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" value="No more nodes" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=18;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;strokeWidth=2;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#ffffff, #ededed);elbow=vertical;startFill=1;startSize=10;endFill=1;endSize=10;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" source="5" target="9" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.4779" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
